thoughts.en: Main building blocks of django are apps. These customize behavior of the project. They can add pages, change templates, add data structures and other functionality. Popular apps are available to extend a django project.
thoughts.uk: Main building blocks of django are apps. These customize behavior of the project. They can add pages, change templates, add data structures and other functionality. Popular apps are available to extend a django project.

thoughts.en: A django project has main directory containing configuration files that control folder structure, activate apps and make their urls available to the web, override their settings and add priority to their behavior (first come first serve).
thoughts.uk: A django project has main directory containing configuration files that control folder structure, activate apps and make their urls available to the web, override their settings and add priority to their behavior (first come first serve).

thoughts.en: Many of the django apps build their functionality around models. For example admin panel automatically creates forms that can be used to fill in the DB. The admin panel behavior can be configured from the model itself (ex. @admin.display) and from the admin.py file.
thoughts.uk: Many of the django apps build their functionality around models. For example admin panel automatically creates forms that can be used to fill in the DB. The admin panel behavior can be configured from the model itself (ex. @admin.display) and from the admin.py file.

thoughts.en: Based on the models django can automatically generate migrations and run them.
thoughts.uk: Based on the models django can automatically generate migrations and run them.

thoughts.en: Django provides both ASGI and WSGI entry points.
thoughts.uk: Django provides both ASGI and WSGI entry points.

thoughts.en: Django uses views to process user calls to urls and provide responses.
thoughts.uk: Django uses views to process user calls to urls and provide responses.

thoughts.en: Django uses templates to configure a view response.
thoughts.uk: Django uses templates to configure a view response.

thoughts.en: Django puts all static files (css, images, etc.) into static folder of an app.
thoughts.uk: Django puts all static files (css, images, etc.) into static folder of an app.

thoughts.en: Django has shortcuts for popular idioms.
thoughts.uk: Django has shortcuts for popular idioms.

thoughts.en: Django has a built in solution for writing tests. Each app can have their own suit of tests.
thoughts.uk: Django has a built in solution for writing tests. Each app can have their own suit of tests.

thoughts.en: Basically apps are self contained and are used as extending/overriding building blocks.
thoughts.uk: Basically apps are self contained and are used as extending/overriding building blocks.
